# BicepAssetComponent

Deploy a Bicep template as a Dagster asset (compiles via `az bicep build` then deploys via ARM).

## Dependencies
- `azure-mgmt-resource`
- `azure-identity`

## Authentication
Reads from environment variables ‚Äî see the `*_env` fields in `component.py`.

## See also
- [Schema](schema.json)
- [Example config](example.yaml)

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Dagster asset name for this Bicep deployment |
| `resource_group` | `str` | Azure resource group to deploy into |
| `deployment_name` | `str` | ARM deployment name (idempotent) |
| `bicep_file` | `str` | Local path to .bicep file |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `parameters` | `dict` | ‚Äî | Inline parameter overrides |

|---|---|---|---|

|---|---|---|---|
